---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new question, topic, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to add or change?

A clear description of your suggestion. Be specific — "add 3 questions on GDPR Article 17" is more useful than "add more GDPR questions".

## Why is this useful?

How does it help with EPSO AD5 preparation?

## Relevant source

If you're suggesting a question or topic, link the authoritative source (DigComp 2.2 PDF, GDPR article, WCAG guideline, etc.) so the answer can be verified.

## Additional context

_Anything else that helps — screenshots, references, example question stems, etc._
